layers.name: Prime Radiant
layers.description: Sheaf-Laplacian coherence engine with GPU kernels, governance, and distributed Raft consensus.

layers.name: Nervous System WASM
layers.description: WebAssembly bindings exposing the nervous-system neural primitives to browser and JS runtimes.

layers.name: Nervous System
layers.description: Neural primitives including WTA competition, dendrites, event bus, HDC, and Hopfield networks.

layers.name: Sona Continual Learning
layers.description: Continual learning subsystem: EWC, LoRA, reasoning bank, training pipelines, and N-API exposure.

overview.name: README.md
overview.summary: Developer README for the nervous-system-wasm crate covering build, test, and usage from JS/TS.

overview.name: README.md
overview.summary: Project README for the sona crate covering architecture, features, and usage examples.

overview.name: Cargo.toml
overview.summary: Cargo manifest for the wasm-bindgen browser/Node bindings of the nervous-system crate.

overview.name: Cargo.toml
overview.summary: Manifest for the sona crate (continual learning, LoRA, EWC, federated training, HF export).

pr_sheaf.name: mod.rs
pr_sheaf.summary: Cohomology submodule barrel exposing simplicial, sheaf, laplacian, cocycle, obstruction, diffusion, and neural primitives.

pr_sheaf.name: sheaf.rs
pr_sheaf.summary: Sheaf data structure assigning stalks to vertices with restriction maps and section assembly.

pr_sheaf.name: cocycle.rs
pr_sheaf.summary: Cocycle and coboundary operations for cohomology with builder and sheaf-aware variants.

pr_sheaf.name: laplacian.rs
pr_sheaf.summary: Sheaf Laplacian L_F = delta* delta with spectrum analysis and harmonic representatives.

pr_sheaf.name: neural.rs
pr_sheaf.summary: Sheaf neural network layers (convolution, pooling) and activations that respect sheaf structure.

pr_sheaf.name: obstruction.rs
pr_sheaf.summary: Obstruction detection identifying non-trivial cohomology classes that prevent global patching.

pr_sheaf.name: diffusion.rs
pr_sheaf.summary: Sheaf diffusion combined with cohomological obstruction indicators to surface global inconsistencies.

pr_sheaf.name: simplex.rs
pr_sheaf.summary: Simplicial complex and chain/cochain types underpinning cohomology computations.

pr_sheaf.name: cohomology_group.rs
pr_sheaf.summary: Computes cohomology groups H^n(K,F), Betti numbers, and harmonic representatives via linear algebra.

pr_sheaf.name: SheafCoherenceValidator
pr_sheaf.summary: Main validator combining coherence gate, policy bundle, and validation logic.

pr_sheaf.name: SheafEdge
pr_sheaf.summary: Sheaf edge carrying source/target NodeIds, restriction map, weight and metadata.

pr_sheaf.name: SheafGraph
pr_sheaf.summary: Primary concurrent graph data structure: nodes + edges in DashMap with atomic counters.

pr_sheaf.name: CoherenceEngine
pr_sheaf.summary: Thread-safe aggregate computing global coherence energy with fingerprint-based caching, parallel rayon path, and residual cache.

pr_sheaf.name: SheafNode
pr_sheaf.summary: Sheaf node holding NodeId, StateVector, and NodeMetadata.

pr_sheaf.name: SheafNode
pr_sheaf.summary: Struct `SheafNode` defined in coherence_benchmarks.rs.

pr_sheaf.name: SheafEdge
pr_sheaf.summary: Struct `SheafEdge` defined in coherence_benchmarks.rs.

pr_sheaf.name: SheafGraph
pr_sheaf.summary: Struct `SheafGraph` defined in coherence_benchmarks.rs.

pr_sheaf.name: SheafNode
pr_sheaf.summary: Struct `SheafNode` defined in energy_bench.rs.

pr_sheaf.name: SheafEdge
pr_sheaf.summary: Struct `SheafEdge` defined in energy_bench.rs.

pr_sheaf.name: SheafGraph
pr_sheaf.summary: Struct `SheafGraph` defined in energy_bench.rs.

pr_raft.name: distributed/state.rs
pr_raft.summary: Replicated CoherenceStateMachine with node states, edge energies, incoherent regions, checkpoints, and snapshots.

pr_raft.name: adapter.rs
pr_raft.summary: Adapter wrapping ruvector-raft for replicating coherence state across cluster nodes.

pr_raft.name: distributed/mod.rs
pr_raft.summary: Distributed coherence root module: Raft-based multi-node coordination wiring adapter, config, and state machine into a DistributedCoherence engine.

pr_raft.name: config.rs
pr_raft.summary: Configuration for Raft-based distributed coherence including NodeRole and cluster settings.

pr_raft.name: DistributedCoherence
pr_raft.summary: Main distributed coherence engine combining Raft consensus with a coherence state machine for replicated tracking.

pr_raft.name: CoherenceStateMachine
pr_raft.summary: Replicated state machine applying CoherenceCommand entries to local maps and checkpoints.

pr_raft.name: CoherenceCommand
pr_raft.summary: Raft-replicated commands for mutating distributed coherence state.

pr_raft.name: CommandResult
pr_raft.summary: Result of applying a CoherenceCommand through Raft.

pr_raft.name: RaftAdapter
pr_raft.summary: Wraps a Raft node to expose coherence-state operations and leadership signals.

pr_raft.name: ClusterStatus
pr_raft.summary: Snapshot of cluster membership, leader, and term.

pr_raft.name: DistributedCoherenceConfig
pr_raft.summary: Config for distributed coherence: node id, peers, election timeouts, snapshotting.

pr_raft.name: NodeRole
pr_raft.summary: Cluster role enum (Leader, Follower, Candidate, Learner).

pr_raft.name: DistributedError
pr_raft.summary: Errors for distributed coherence operations: leader/quorum, replication, timeout, configuration failures.

pr_raft.name: CoherenceStatus
pr_raft.summary: Aggregated coherence status combining energy, incoherent region count, and cluster health.

pr_raft.name: NodeState
pr_raft.summary: Per-node distributed state vector with last-update timestamp.

pr_raft.name: EdgeEnergy
pr_raft.summary: Edge energy with bounded history buffer and trend/stability analysis.

pr_raft.name: IncoherentRegion
pr_raft.summary: Tracks a flagged incoherent region by id, member node set, and activation state.

pr_raft.name: Checkpoint
pr_raft.summary: Periodic snapshot summary of total energy, edge count, and incoherent count at a Raft index.

pr_raft.name: ApplyResult
pr_raft.summary: Result variants from applying a Raft command to the state machine.

pr_raft.name: StateSummary
pr_raft.summary: Compact summary of state machine: indices, counts, total energy.

pr_gpu.name: gpu/buffer.rs
pr_gpu.summary: GPU buffer abstractions: typed graph data structs, GpuBuffer wrapper, manager, pool, and usage flags.

pr_gpu.name: gpu/kernels.rs
pr_gpu.summary: Concrete compute kernels: residuals, energy, sheaf attention, and token routing with their parameter Pod structs.

pr_gpu.name: gpu/dispatch.rs
pr_gpu.summary: Command-encoder driven dispatch with reusable pipeline cache and a builder for binding groups.

pr_gpu.name: gpu/engine.rs
pr_gpu.summary: GpuCoherenceEngine: end-to-end GPU pipeline for coherence energy over a SheafGraph using kernels and buffer manager.

pr_gpu.name: gpu/error.rs
pr_gpu.summary: GpuError enum with conversions from wgpu request/async errors.

pr_gpu.name: gpu/pipeline.rs
pr_gpu.summary: ComputePipeline + PipelineCache (DashMap-backed) and binding descriptor types for kernel construction.

pr_gpu.name: gpu/mod.rs
pr_gpu.summary: GPU module barrel: re-exports buffer/device/dispatch/engine/error/pipeline plus shader and workgroup helpers and global constants.

pr_gpu.name: gpu/device.rs
pr_gpu.summary: wgpu device/adapter wrapper with capability info and options.

pr_governance.name: governance/policy.rs
pr_governance.summary: Policy bundle data model: ids, status, approvals, thresholds, escalation rules, builder.

pr_governance.name: witness.rs
pr_governance.summary: Witness adapter recording correlated unified witness entries across systems.

pr_governance.name: governance/mod.rs
pr_governance.summary: Governance root: shared Hash/Timestamp/Version primitives and re-exports for policy, witness, lineage, repository.

pr_governance.name: governance/repository.rs
pr_governance.summary: Repository traits and in-memory implementations for policies, witnesses, and lineage records.

pr_governance.name: governance/witness.rs
pr_governance.summary: Witness chain primitives: WitnessRecord, GateDecision, EnergySnapshot, ComputeLane (governance-scope), and chain builder.

pr_governance.name: governance/lineage.rs
pr_governance.summary: Lineage tracking: records, operations, entity references, and per-entity lineage tracker.

pr_governance.name: witness_log.rs
pr_governance.summary: Unified witness log chaining inference and coherence witnesses with content hashing and query DSL.

pr_governance.name: GenerationWitness
pr_governance.summary: Unified, hash-chained witness combining inference and coherence summaries.

pr_governance.name: WitnessAdapter
pr_governance.summary: Adapter coordinating witness entries between Prime-Radiant and RuvLLM.

pr_governance.name: UnifiedWitnessEntry
pr_governance.summary: Witness entry unifying source-tagged events with metrics and embeddings.

pr_governance.name: WitnessEncoding
pr_governance.summary: Encoded witness record as a hypervector.

pr_governance.name: GovernanceStorage
pr_governance.summary: Send+Sync trait for governance artifacts (policies, witnesses, lineage).

pr_governance.name: substrate/repository.rs
pr_governance.summary: SheafGraphRepository trait abstracting graph persistence; ships an InMemoryGraphRepository implementation.

pr_governance.name: governance_audit.rs
pr_governance.summary: Runnable example (governance_audit.rs); 14 fn, 2 struct.

pr_governance.name: HallucinationPolicy
pr_governance.summary: Policy describing how hallucinations are handled.

pr_governance.name: UnifiedWitnessLog
pr_governance.summary: Hash-chained store of generation witnesses with query/verification/export.

pr_governance.name: PolicyRepository
pr_governance.summary: Trait abstracting CRUD/query operations over policy bundles.

pr_governance.name: WitnessRepository
pr_governance.summary: Trait abstracting witness record storage and retrieval.

pr_governance.name: LineageRepository
pr_governance.summary: Trait abstracting lineage record storage and traversal.

pr_governance.name: InMemoryPolicyRepository
pr_governance.summary: In-memory PolicyRepository implementation for tests and embedded use.

ns_neural.name: event.rs
ns_neural.summary: Event trait, DVSEvent (Dynamic Vision Sensor) event type, and EventSurface for sparse 2D event tracking.

ns_neural.name: vector.rs
ns_neural.summary: Binary Hypervector with 10000 bits packed into 157 u64 words, SIMD-friendly XOR binding and popcount similarity.

ns_neural.name: network.rs
ns_neural.summary: Core Modern Hopfield Network (Ramsauer et al. 2020) with exponential capacity and transformer-style attention retrieval.

ns_neural.name: coincidence.rs
ns_neural.summary: NMDA-like coincidence detection for temporal pattern matching within coincidence windows.

ns_neural.name: dendrite/mod.rs
ns_neural.summary: Dendrite module barrel exposing Compartment, Dendrite, PlateauPotential, and DendriticTree.

ns_neural.name: tree.rs
ns_neural.summary: Multi-branch dendritic tree with soma integration combining branch outputs into neural output.

ns_neural.name: eventbus/mod.rs
ns_neural.summary: EventBus module barrel exposing BackpressureController, DVSEvent, EventRingBuffer, and ShardedEventBus.

ns_neural.name: queue.rs
ns_neural.summary: Lock-free SPSC ring buffer for event queues with <100ns push/pop and atomic head/tail pointers.

ns_neural.name: shard.rs
ns_neural.summary: Region-based event bus sharding with spatial, temporal, and hybrid partitioning strategies.

ns_neural.name: hdc/mod.rs
ns_neural.summary: HDC module barrel exposing Hypervector, HdcMemory, ops, and similarity primitives with HYPERVECTOR_BITS=10000.

ns_neural.name: hopfield/mod.rs
ns_neural.summary: Modern Hopfield network module barrel exposing ModernHopfield, compute_attention, softmax, and capacity helpers.

ns_neural.name: Dendrite
ns_neural.summary: Dendrite with NMDA-like coincidence detection that triggers plateau potentials.

ns_neural.name: compartment.rs
ns_neural.summary: Single compartment with membrane and calcium dynamics using exponential decay.

ns_neural.name: plateau.rs
ns_neural.summary: Dendritic plateau potential providing behavioral timescale credit assignment signal for BTSP.

ns_neural.name: DendriticTree
ns_neural.summary: Multi-branch dendritic tree with coincidence detection on each branch and soma integration.

ns_neural.name: backpressure.rs
ns_neural.summary: Adaptive backpressure controller with high/low watermarks and Normal/Throttle/Drop state transitions.

ns_neural.name: Event
ns_neural.summary: Core event trait providing timestamp, source_id, and payload accessors for timestamped event streams.

ns_neural.name: EventRingBuffer
ns_neural.summary: Lock-free SPSC ring buffer with power-of-2 capacity and Acquire/Release atomic ordering.

ns_neural.name: hdc/memory.rs
ns_neural.summary: Associative memory for hyperdimensional computing supporting 10^40 pattern capacity with key-based storage and similarity retrieval.

ns_neural.name: wta.rs
ns_neural.summary: Winner-Take-All competition layer with lateral inhibition and refractory periods for HNSW navigation decisions.

ns_plasticity.name: ewc_tests.rs
ns_plasticity.summary: Integration tests covering elastic weight consolidation (EWC) memory and continual-learning regularizers in the nervous system crate.

ns_routing.name: workspace_integration.rs
ns_routing.summary: End-to-end test for the global-workspace broadcast loop plus subscriber convergence.

sona_continual.name: lora.rs
sona_continual.summary: LoRA (low-rank adaptation) adapter store — manages adapter ranks, application, and merge operations.

sona_continual.name: reasoning_bank.rs
sona_continual.summary: Reasoning-bank vault — stores extracted reasoning traces keyed by trajectory ID for replay.

sona_continual.name: ewc.rs
sona_continual.summary: Elastic weight consolidation regularizer — computes Fisher information and applies penalty to slow catastrophic forgetting.

sona_training.name: pipeline.rs
sona_training.summary: Core training pipeline — drives batched forward/backward passes with optional EWC and LoRA stages.

sona_training.name: federated.rs
sona_training.summary: Federated-training driver — aggregates gradients/updates across distributed sona nodes.

sona_training.name: coordinator.rs
sona_training.summary: Loop coordinator — schedules instant vs background loops and brokers shared state via a mailbox.

sona_training.name: instant.rs
sona_training.summary: Instant inference loop — processes incoming trajectories with low-latency LoRA adapters.

sona_training.name: background.rs
sona_training.summary: Background consolidation loop — periodically replays buffered trajectories with EWC regularization.

wasm.name: lib.rs
wasm.summary: Crate root of the nervous-system-wasm bindings — re-exports submodule wasm-bindgen surface and panic hook init.

wasm.name: workspace.rs
wasm.summary: WASM bindings for the global-workspace broadcast/subscribe loop.

wasm.name: web.rs
wasm.summary: wasm-bindgen-test suite exercising the browser-side bindings end-to-end.

wasm.name: hdc.rs
wasm.summary: WASM bindings for hyperdimensional computing (HDC) bind/bundle/permute operations.

wasm.name: btsp.rs
wasm.summary: WASM bindings for the BTSP (behavioral-timescale synaptic plasticity) submodule of the nervous system.

wasm.name: wta.rs
wasm.summary: WASM bindings for winner-take-all (WTA) competitive selection over feature populations.

wasm.name: Cargo.toml
wasm.summary: Cargo manifest for the wasm-bindgen browser/Node bindings of the nervous-system crate.
